## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes.

## Why

Link to issue, or describe the problem being solved.

## Test plan

How did you verify this works?

- [ ] Ran affected script locally (`python scripts/version_sentry.py ...` or `python scripts/dashboard.py ...`)
- [ ] Dashboard rendered correctly (open `docs/index.html` in browser)
- [ ] Workflow YAML passes `actionlint` (if changed)
- [ ] No regressions in existing flows

## Checklist

- [ ] Code in `scripts/` is stdlib-only (no new external deps)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional-commit-ish format
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude...` or `Generated with...` trailers

Anything specific to look at? Anything intentionally out of scope?
